botcomponent.description:
Analyze an existing SLP discharge summary to ensure it clearly documents course of care, progress on each goal, current functional communication or swallowing status, remaining limitations, and follow‑up recommendations. Identify gaps or vague language and propose improved, defensible phrasing.
analyze slp discharge summary
analyze slp dc note
check this slp discharge note
is this slp discharge summary complete
Trigger phrases: slp discharge note quality check analyze slp discharge summary
analyze slp dc note
check this slp discharge note
is this slp discharge summary complete
slp discharge note quality check
botcomponent.name: Analyze SLP Discharge Summary
